message:
fix(security,vef): numeric safety, off-by-one, and length-prefixed hashing in lineage/proof subsystems

lineage_tracker.rs:
- Off-by-one fix: check_depth_limit() changes <= to < so reaching
  exactly max_graph_depth is treated as exceeding the limit
- Guard recall and precision calculations with is_finite(), returning
  0.0 for NaN/Inf to prevent poisoned metrics

evidence_capsule.rs:
- Replace passed += 1 with saturating_add(1) to prevent overflow

proof_verifier.rs:
- Replace all += 1 in VerificationGate trust decision counting with
  saturating_add(1) for allow, deny, degrade, and deny_reasons counters
- compute_report_digest() now includes (bytes.len() as u64).to_le_bytes()
  before payload in SHA-256, preventing concatenation-ambiguity attacks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
